AlternativeSmMapping.Name: Cyclic synchronous torque mode with commutation angle (CSTCA)
Drive motion control (For TC3 DriveMotionControl Lib)

EnumInfo.Text: Cyclic synchronous torque mode with commutation angle (CSTCA)
Cyclic synchronous torque mode with commutation angle (CSTCA)
Disable drive function, motor is free to rotate
Slow down on slow down ramp

SubItem.Name: Statusword
SubItem.Comment: Bit 0 : Ready to switch on Bit 1 : Switched on Bit 2 : Operation enabled Bit 3 : Fault Bit 4 : reserved Bit 5 : reserved Bit 6 : Switch on disabled Bit 7 : Warning Bit 8 + 9 : reserved Bit 10 : TxPDOToggle Bit 11 : Internal limit active Bit 12 : Drive follows the command value Bit 13 : Input cycle counter Bit 14 - 15 : reserved

SubItem.Name: Torque limitation status
SubItem.Comment: Bit 0 : Torque demand value is equal to ramp input Bit 1 : High velocity limit active Bit 2 : Low velocity limit active Bit 3 - 7 : reserved

SubItem.Name: Controlword
SubItem.Comment: Bit 0 : Switch on Bit 1 : Enable voltage Bit 2 : reserved Bit 3 : Enable operation Bit 4 - 6 : reserved Bit 7 : Fault reset Bit 8 - 15 : reserved

SubItem.Name: DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on positive edge
DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on negative edge
Position loop velocity feed forward gain

Object.Name: DRV RxPDO-Map Positive torque limit value
DRV RxPDO-Map Negative torque limit value
DRV RxPDO-Map Low velocity limit value
DRV RxPDO-Map High velocity limit value
DRV TxPDO-Map Following error actual value
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 1 pos position
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 1 neg position
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 2 pos position
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 2 neg position
DRV TxPDO-Map Modes of operation display
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 1 pos timestamp
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 1 neg timestamp
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 2 pos timestamp
FB TxPDO-Map Touch probe 2 neg timestamp

SubItem.Name: Position loop velocity feed forward gain

DiagMessage.MessageText: PDO-Konfiguration ist zur gewählten Betriebsart nicht kompatibel
PDO-configuration is incompatible to the selected mode of operation
Error detected, but disabled by suppression mask
Ungültiger Wert für Modes of operation
Ungültige Kombination von In- und Output PDOs
Invalid combination of Inputs and Outputs PDOs
Inhalt von PDO 0x%X ist ungÃ¼ltig: Eintrag 0x%X:%X kann nicht verwendet werden
Content of PDO 0x%X is invalid: Item 0x%X:%X cannot be mapped
Inhalt von PDO 0x%X ist ungÃ¼ltig: Eintrag 0x%X:%X hat eine falsche Lä®§e (%d Bit)
Content of PDO 0x%X is invalid: Item 0x%X:%X has an unsupported length (%d bit)
Überstrom auf Phase U, V oder W
STO ist bei aktiver Achse aufgetreten
STO while the axis was enabled
Invalid process data format (number of singleturn bits+multiturn bits != 32)
Kombination aus Mode of Operation und Commutation Type ist nicht zulässig
Combination of Mode of Operation and Commutation Type is invalid
Target position not in modulo range
Latch-Einheit wird von mehreren Modulen zeitgleich genutzt
Latch unit will be used by multiple modules
Target position ist größer als der Modulofaktor
Antrieb darf nicht in Regelung sein

Entry.Name: Controlword
Entry.Comment: Bit 0 : Switch on Bit 1 : Enable voltage Bit 2 : reserved Bit 3 : Enable operation Bit 4 - 6 : reserved Bit 7 : Fault reset Bit 8 - 15 : reserved

Entry.Name: Touch probe function__TP1 Enable pos edge
Touch probe function__TP1 Enable neg edge
Touch probe function__TP2 Enable pos edge
Touch probe function__TP2 Enable neg edge
DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on positive edge
DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on negative edge
DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on positive edge
DMC__FeedbackControl__Enable latch extern on negative edge
Statusword
Entry.Comment: Bit 0 : Ready to switch on Bit 1 : Switched on Bit 2 : Operation enabled Bit 3 : Fault Bit 4 : reserved Bit 5 : reserved Bit 6 : Switch on disabled Bit 7 : Warning Bit 8 + 9 : reserved Bit 10 : TxPDOToggle Bit 11 : Internal limit active Bit 12 : Drive follows the command value Bit 13 : Input cycle counter Bit 14 - 15 : reserved

Entry.Name: Touch probe status__TP1 Pos value stored
Touch probe status__TP1 Neg value stored
Touch probe status__TP2 Pos value stored
Touch probe status__TP2 Neg value stored
Torque limitation status
Entry.Comment: Bit 0 : Torque demand value is equal to ramp input Bit 1 : High velocity limit active Bit 2 : Low velocity limit active Bit 3 - 7 : reserved
